_comment: Perf regression budgets for `vbench compare --gate`. A query violates only when its observed hot wall exceeds its blessed baseline by more than `budget_pct` percent AND by at least `min_delta_ms` absolute (so a percent of a tiny baseline can't gate on noise). Cold runs are advisory-only (never gate). `overrides` is keyed by query id and wins over the tag-level defaults. Baselines are single-machine medians: re-bless locally (`vbench baseline --perf --run <fresh run>`) before gating on a different machine — see README `Baselines, budgets & gating`.
